text.title: Security Testing Tool Categories
text.summary: SAST, DAST, SCA, and secret-detection tools with their intended use context and key CLI commands.

section.title: SAST — Static Application Security Testing
section.p: Analyzes source code without executing the application. Run on every commit and PR.

list.item: Semgrep — multi-language, custom rules, fast CI integration; semgrep --config p/owasp-top-ten .
Bandit — Python-specific security patterns; bandit -r src/ -f json -o bandit-report.json
CodeQL — deep dataflow analysis, GitHub-native; gh extension install github/gh-codeql
Snyk Code — developer-friendly, PR feedback, reachability analysis

section.title: DAST — Dynamic Application Security Testing
section.p: Tests running applications by simulating attacks. Use on staging environments only.

list.item: OWASP ZAP — open source, scriptable, CI-friendly; docker run zaproxy/zap-stable zap-baseline.py -t https://target.com
Nuclei — template-based scanning; nuclei -u https://target.com -t cves/
Burp Suite — manual penetration testing, deep analysis
StackHawk — DAST in CI with hawk CLI and IaC support

rule.statement: Provide DAST tools with an authenticated session via a custom auth script — unauthenticated DAST misses 80% of the attack surface.
rule.rationale: Most application logic sits behind authentication. Unauthenticated scans find only public endpoints and misconfiguration.

section.title: SCA — Software Composition Analysis
section.p: Scans dependencies for known CVEs and license issues. Run on every build.

list.item: Snyk — continuous monitoring, auto-fix PRs, reachability; npm i -g snyk
Trivy — containers, IaC, SBOM; brew install trivy
pip-audit / safety — Python packages; pip install pip-audit
npm audit — Node.js packages, bundled with npm
osv-scanner — Google OSV vulnerability database; brew install osv-scanner

rule.statement: Use reachability analysis (Snyk Code, Semgrep Pro) to distinguish exploitable CVEs from unreachable transitive dependencies. CVSS score alone is a poor triage signal.
rule.rationale: SCA generates high noise from transitive deps. A CVSS-10 in unreachable code is lower priority than a CVSS-6 in a public endpoint.

section.title: Secret Detection
section.p: Finds hardcoded credentials, API keys, and tokens in source code and git history.

list.item: TruffleHog — entropy + patterns, 700+ detectors, verified mode; trufflehog git file://. --only-verified
Gitleaks — regex patterns, fast, pre-commit hook; gitleaks detect --source . --verbose
detect-secrets — baseline methodology, low false positives; pip install detect-secrets
GitHub Secret Scanning — native to GitHub, free for public repos
